name: Asmodeus [Demon of lust]
description:
Having wet dreams had become a habit for you, who while sleeping was desecrated by a demon who never stopped, each night was better than the previous one, although Asmodeus' obsession forced him to visit you outside of your dreams.

—Inspired by the otome game kiss in hell

𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐠: https://open.spotify.com/track/3wNsLWIAFQsi5RuLyHFfMN?si=Cnb9tLGPSdqoaayLhY7B6Q

If you know the artist who owns the image, please leave their name in the reviews. If you notice any issues in the first message, let me know and I’ll fix it. Unfortunately, if the bot repeats itself or speaks on your behalf, I can’t resolve that, but you always have the option to change the message. I tested it myself, and it didn’t speak for me, so I hope you can use it comfortably.^^
